<!-- GENERATED by @gmolike/agent-core@1.3.1 — do not edit by hand. Source: shared/rules/35-design.md -->

# Visual Quality Bar

_Applies when: building or changing any user-facing UI (web pages, app shells, dashboards, components, emails)._

Non-negotiable: never ship generic, mediocre "08/15" AI-looking UI. Every interface aims
to be graphically appealing, visually high-end, and design-led. Default AI output is the
floor to escape, not the target.

## Use the design skills — don't freestyle

- Reach for the design skills as the working method, not an afterthought:
  `impeccable` (review/redesign/polish/audit), `frontend-design` and
  `high-end-visual-design` (distinctive production-grade interfaces),
  `design` (Canva-MCP workflow), plus targeted ones (`animate`, `bolder`, `delight`,
  `polish`, `critique`, `redesign-existing-projects`).
- For a fresh surface: get direction first (concept, references, hierarchy) before coding.

## What "high-end" means here

- Strong, dominant visual hierarchy — one clear focal point per view, deliberate scale contrast.
- Atmosphere and depth: considered backgrounds/surfaces, layered shadows, gradients with intent.
- Editorial, confident typography (real type scale, generous spacing) — not default system stacks.
- Calibrated, restrained color: a single coherent palette, ideally in `oklch` for perceptual
  uniformity. Highlighted key values, charts with polish, clear silhouettes/motifs.
- Purposeful motion and micro-interactions; respect `prefers-reduced-motion`.
- Banish generic tells: equal-weight everything, center-everything, default blue, flat gray cards,
  cards-in-cards-in-cards, lorem density with no second-read moment.

## Tokens & theming

- Drive all visual values through design tokens / CSS custom properties — no hardcoded px,
  colors, or shadows in components. Use `cn()`-style helpers, never className string arrays.
- Tailwind v4 CSS-first (`@theme`, CSS vars in `:root` + theme class); no per-component magic numbers.
- Theme switch (light/dark) flicker-free: read preference before first paint (no-FOUC script).

## Verify visually before done

- "Green tests" is not done. Open the result in a real browser and look at it
  (`claude-in-chrome` / Playwright MCP); capture screenshots.
- Load real/demo data — empty states hide whether the design actually carries richness.
- Gotchas: serve offline single-file builds over `http.server` (browsers block `file://`);
  rebuild before re-testing to avoid stale bundles.
- Accessibility is part of the bar: WCAG AA contrast, keyboard nav, visible focus, labels.
